---
title: Contract events publisher
description: Emit contract-to-contract events and off-chain RPC events.
---

## Contract events: publisher

[Open in Playground](https://playground.xelis.io/?%3D%3D)

`emit_event` is for contract-to-contract listeners. `fire_rpc_event` is for off-chain clients watching daemon WebSocket events.

```rust filename="price_publisher.slx" copy
const PRICE_EVENT: u64 = 100

struct PriceRpcEvent {
    symbol: string,
    price: u64,
    height: u64
}

entry publish_price(symbol: string, price: u64) -> u64 {
    let block: Block = Block::current()
    emit_event(PRICE_EVENT, [symbol, price, block.timestamp()])
    fire_rpc_event(70, PriceRpcEvent {
        symbol,
        price,
        height: block.height()
    })
    return 0
}
```

Deploy this first, then pass its contract hash to the listener in the next example.
